parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Extract Lead ID').first().json.lead_id, step: 'website_fallback', status: 'started' }) }}

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const c = $('Get Contacts').first().json; const list = Array.isArray(c) ? c : (c.contacts || c || []); const a = Array.isArray(list) ? list : []; return 'in.(' + a.map(x=>x.id).filter(Boolean).join(',') + ')'; })() }}
